series_metadata.series_description: Pesticide Data Program (PDP) Financial Records: Each State is required to retain financial records including supporting documentation needed to substantiate charges made to PDP. This includes the grant, the cooperative agreement contract and the award.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 3 years and/or audited following the date of submission of the final expenditure report or until transferred to machine readable format. ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years and/or audited following the date of submission of the final expenditure report., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
